arabic_text:
نسبت اعلی
نسبت ادنی
معراج
محبت
امام
علی
محمد
english_text:
Higher relation
Lower relation
Mi'raj (Ascension)
Love
Imam
Ali
Muhammad
alt_text: Two stacked diagrams similar to image 001 but with a yellow-highlighted central 'محبت' (Love) circle and a 'معراج' (Mi'raj/Ascension) reference at the bottom. Shows the spiritual ascent through love and the higher/lower relations between Imam, Ali, and Muhammad figures.
notes: Pairs with image 001. The Mi'raj reference at the bottom and the centered Love (محبت) circle suggest this depicts the ascension dynamic — the spiritual movement from lower to higher relation through love.
